claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.boundary: A neutral div writes native dir and the identical context value.
semantics.default: ltr is deterministic when no provider exists.
semantics.isolation: Boundary isolation is opt-in and changes CSS bidi containment only; it adds no role, name, event, or focus behavior.

direction.nesting: The nearest provider wins and outer direction resumes after the subtree.
direction.portal: React context follows portals; Portal additionally writes native dir on its DOM boundary.
direction.logicalSides: start resolves to left in LTR and right in RTL; end is the inverse.
direction.css: Consumers use logical properties unless a physical coordinate is semantically required.
direction.isolateOptOut: With isolate=false the data attribute and unicode-bidi declaration are absent while native dir and context remain synchronized.

consumerResponsibilities: Use Direction.Boundary or a native dir attribute whenever the DOM bidi algorithm must change.
Isolate mixed-direction user content with dir=auto or bdi.
Mirror only spatial icons and document whether arrow keys are spatial or logical.
